title: Music production company looking for plugin developer
excerpt: Hi,  I love the functionality of what Monday can bring to managing projects but there’s a few specialist things that I wish it could do.    I’m looking for a developer to help build a tool where we can quickly upload and…

posts.author: molecularsound (Dave Connolly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I love the functionality of what Monday can bring to managing projects but there’s a few specialist things that I wish it could do. I’m looking for a developer to help build a tool where we can quickly upload and listen to audio files, as well as add feedback at various points in the track.

If anyone has this experience and is available, please contact me either here or at dave@molecularsound.com

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @molecularsound
In monday you can upload music files, directly within the interface or using an external tool.

Screen Shot 2021-01-05 at 17.06.541184×130 8.74 KB

If the file is in MP3 or other compatible formats, it can be directly played in the browser.

Screen Shot 2021-01-05 at 17.06.181393×891 28.2 KB

Feedbacks could be attached as updates or sub-items using one or more columns to specify minutes:seconds point in the track.

We, as monday.com partner, can assist you in developing a custom solution matching your needs.
Please contact us at info@omnidea.it with further details.
